query:
-- Verificar todos os grupos de ponto da carne e suas opções atuais
SELECT cg.id, cg.name, mi.name as item_name, co.id as opt_id, co.name as opt_name
FROM menu_addon_groups cg
JOIN menu_items mi ON mi.id = cg.menuItemId
JOIN menu_addon_options co ON co.groupId = cg.id
WHERE cg.name LIKE '%ponto%' OR cg.name LIKE '%Ponto%'
ORDER BY cg.id, co.displayOrder;
